title: fagus grandifolia subsp. mexicana
intro: Fagus grandifolia subsp. mexicana, also known as the Mexican American beech, is a subspecies of tree native to eastern Mexico and the southern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Fagus grandifolia subsp. mexicana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
